response.title: Chief Operations Officer (COO)
response.description: Innovative Manufacturing Solutions Inc. is seeking an experienced Chief Operations Officer (COO) to oversee and manage the company's operational processes, ensuring efficiency and effectiveness across our manufacturing facilities. The COO will be responsible for driving strategic initiatives aimed at increasing productivity, reducing costs, and enhancing product quality while ensuring compliance with industry regulations and standards. This role requires a forward-thinking leader adept at fostering a culture of innovation within the organization.

required_skills: Expertise in Lean Manufacturing principles and Six Sigma methodologies
Proficient in supply chain management and logistics optimization
Experience with advanced manufacturing technologies (e.g., automation, robotics)
Strong financial acumen and budget management skills
Proven track record of leading large-scale operational transformations
preferred_skills: Knowledge of Environmental, Health and Safety (EHS) regulations in manufacturing
Experience with data analytics and performance metrics to drive decision-making
Familiarity with Quality Management Systems (QMS) such as ISO 9001
Leadership experience in a multinational manufacturing environment
Ability to speak multiple languages as an asset
requirements.education: Master's degree in Business Administration, Engineering, or related field
